"'''Moment of Doubt'''" is a 12-page comic story that appeared in ''[[Star Wars Tales 4]]''. The story was written by [[Lovern Kindzierski]], pencils by [[Robert Teranishi]], letters by [[Vickie Williams]] and colors by [[David McCaig|Dave McCaig]]. It takes place [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

==Plot summary==
[[Stauz Czycz|Awarru Tark]] arrives aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']] in a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 freighter]], answering [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] call for bounty hunters to find the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. When he meets with Vader he immediately launches a vicious assault on the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] with grenades and light blades that extend from his arms.

As Vader reaches into Tark's mind he finds Awarru Tark is actually [[Stauz Czycz]]. Czycz underwent a surgical transformation to implant a force field generator into his body, so that he could attack Vader in revenge, having lost his own family to an Imperial assault on his homeworld.

Using telekinesis to disable the generator, Vader decapitates Czycz, leaving him to consider Czycz's status as more machine than man.
